Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,526,393Details
International Box Office $38,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $70,326,393
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,812,287 (40.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,905 opening theaters/2,905 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $60,717,499

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 27th, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 7th, 2004 (Wide), released as Anacondas: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid (Australia)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action violence, scary images and some language.
Running Time: 96 minutes
Franchise: Anaconda
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad
Subgenre: Nature Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Middle Fork
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Indonesian
